content.question: What is the causal effect of 6/8-year gimnázium admission policies on ethnic/Roma school segregation, controlling for residential segregation and family choice, and does abolition of early selection reduce between-school ethnic sorting?
content.reduction_path: Identify and study Hungarian jurisdictions or time periods where 6/8-year track expansion or contraction varied exogenously, measuring induced changes in ethnic composition of schools and comparing segregation indices before/after policy changes
